checks.description: When either multiplicand or multiplier is zero, the product output must eventually settle to zero.
checks.pass_condition: If mul_a == 0 or mul_b == 0, mul_out must transition to a stable zero value without remaining X or Z.
checks.trigger_condition: When a stimulus sets mul_a or mul_b to zero.

checks.description: mul_out must become a defined (non-X, non-Z) value after a legal operation completes.
checks.pass_condition: After the operation stimulus, mul_out should transition from unknown to a concrete binary value within a conservative observation window.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 case applies a legal mul_a/mul_b stimulus.
